If another enabled gateway declares the: If another enabled gateway declares the same rail, only the cheaper one (by unit price) is shown to users.
Its rail is fixed to Alipay for cross-ga: Its rail is fixed to Alipay for cross-gateway price comparison — if another gateway also declares Alipay, only the cheaper one is shown to users.
Channels are auto-grouped by model-name: Channels are auto-grouped by model-name similarity. Review each suggested alias, adjust the real upstream model per channel, then apply. Applying is additive — the original model names remain callable.
No differently-named duplicate models we: No differently-named duplicate models were found across your channels. Aliases are suggested when the same model appears under different names in two or more channels.
Pick source channel(s) to read upstream: Pick source channel(s) to read upstream prices, set a global markup and optional per-vendor overrides, then apply. Sell price = upstream price × (1 + markup%). Note: this bakes the markup into local prices — keep the group ratio at 1 to avoid double-charging.
Click \"Select source channels\" and cho: Click "Select source channels" and choose the channel whose upstream prices should be the cost basis.
Models with expression/tiered billing ca: Models with expression/tiered billing cannot be marked up by a flat percentage and were left unchanged.
No upstream prices found for the selecte: No upstream prices found for the selected channels
Pick source channel(s) to read upstream: Pick source channel(s) to read upstream prices, set a global markup and optional per-vendor overrides, then apply. Sell price = upstream price × (1 + markup%).
The group ratio multiplies your LOCAL pr: The group ratio multiplies your LOCAL price, not the channel cost. To earn a fixed % on every model, local price must first equal cost — that is exactly what this tool sets.
After applying here, keep the group rati: After applying here, keep the group ratio at 1, otherwise the two markups stack (cost × markup × group ratio).
Only channels whose upstream exposes a p: Only channels whose upstream exposes a price list return prices; other channels have nothing to mark up.
These models have not been auto-classifi: These models have not been auto-classified to a vendor. Verify manually, then rescan — once their alias matches a known model name they move to the right vendor group.
